title: galium ciliatum var. pusillum
intro: Galium ciliatum var. pusillum is a plant species that is a subspecies of Galium ciliatum, also known as the fringed bedstraw, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galium ciliatum var. pusillum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from minor wounds to more serious infections.
